      +-------+
      |  End  |
      +-------+
          ^
+---------+---------+
|  [  Container  ]  |
|         |         |
| +-------+-------+ |
| |  Single Node  | |
| +---------------+ |
+---------^---------+
          |
          |
          |
     +----+----+
     |  Start  |
     +---------+
